meaning: adj.向海面吹的,离岸的,海面上的
examples: One day a larger ship anchored offshore.
The island offers a wide range of offshore banking facilities.
A powerful offshore quake could cause a large tsunami that would reach the shore within minutes.
Soros, on the other hand, manages a huge offshore hedge fund for wealthy individuals and institutions.
The seaport also provides supplies and services to more than half of all offshore drilling operations.
